name: mythic-rings-v3
description: Mythic Rings v3 — Build pipeline for the professional manual

scripts.build:pdf: node build/pdf-renderer.js chapters/ dist/ && python3 build/pdf-builder.py dist/
scripts.build:all: python3 scripts/clean_chapters.py && node build/engine.js chapters/ dist/ && node build/pdf-renderer.js chapters/ dist/ && python3 build/pdf-builder.py dist/
scripts.watch: nodemon --watch chapters --ext md --exec "node build/engine.js chapters/ dist/"
